summary: Textual TUI app for mimicode: chat history + prompt input, resumable sessions
detail: tui.py implements MimicodeApp (Textual App) with ChatHistory (VerticalScroll), MessageBox (Static, markup=False), ThinkingIndicator, and PromptInput. Calls agent_turn() asynchronously and persists messages via save_messages(). Launched via `python agent.py --tui [-s session_id]` or directly via tui.py --session. markup=False on MessageBox is critical — tool output contains brackets that crash Rich renderer.
decisions: Used Textual over curses/rich direct — widget model handles layout and async cleanly
markup=False on MessageBox — Rich brackets in tool output caused MarkupError in _refresh_layout
ThinkingIndicator uses display:none/block CSS toggle rather than mount/unmount

changes.why: brackets in tool output crash Rich renderer
